title: Horus Guide Front-Matter
description: Schema for YAML front-matter on files under /docs/*.md. Consumed by the CI validator (story 8381c62a) and authored against by contributors (see /docs/_contributing.md).

title.description: Human-facing title. Shown in `horus guide` list, `horus help` See-also, and host-agent prompts.

description.description: One-line summary. ≤140 chars recommended. Shown in topic index and Docusaurus sidebar.

slug.description: Stable kebab-case identifier. Globally unique across /docs/. Part of the user-facing command surface — treat as frozen once shipped.

tags.description: Broad categorization (e.g. onboarding, anvil, forge). ≥1 entry.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Currently must equal 1. Bump when introducing breaking changes.

keywords.description: Retrieval signal — boosts BM25 scoring for synonyms and alternate phrasings. Empty array triggers a warning but does not fail the build.

related_commands.description: Commands rendered in the `horus guide <topic>` output footer. Empty array is allowed.

sidebar_position.description: Docusaurus-only. Ignored by CLI retrieval. Kept for schema compatibility when the Docusaurus workstream unparks.
